name: Insulin-resistant diabetes mellitus
description: A type of diabetes mellitus related not to lack of insulin but rather to lack of response to insulin on the part of the target tissues of insulin such as muscle, fat, and liver cells. It consists of several polypeptide chains and is L-shaped, with a horizontal arm lying in the membrane and a vertical arm that projects into the matrix. The electrons of NADH enter the chain at this complex." [GOC:imk, GOC:jid, ISBN:0716749556]

name: NADH dehydrogenase complex
description: "An integral membrane complex that possesses NADH oxidoreductase activity. The complex is one of the components of the electron transport chain. It catalyzes the transfer of a pair of electrons from NADH to a quinone." [GOC:mah]

name: Mitochondrial complex I assembly model OXPHOS system
description: Mitochondrial complex I assembly model OXPHOS system

name: Electron transport chain OXPHOS system in mitochondria
description: Electron transport chain OXPHOS system in mitochondria

name: respiratory electron transport chain
description: "A process in which a series of electron carriers operate together to transfer electrons from donors such as NADH and FADH2 to any of several different terminal electron acceptors to generate a transmembrane electrochemical gradient." [GOC:mtg_electron_transport, ISBN:0716720094]

name: Impaired glucose tolerance
description: An abnormal resistance to glucose, i.e., a reduction in the ability to maintain glucose levels in the blood stream within normal limits following oral or intravenous administration of glucose.

name: Respiratory electron transport
description: Respiratory electron transport

name: Insulin resistance
description: Increased resistance towards insulin, that is, diminished effectiveness of insulin in reducing blood glucose levels.

name: Insulin secretion
description: Insulin secretion

name: mitochondrial electron transport, NADH to ubiquinone
description: "The transfer of electrons from NADH to ubiquinone that occurs during oxidative phosphorylation." [ISBN:0716731363]

name: proton motive force-driven mitochondrial ATP synthesis
description: "The chemical reactions and pathways resulting in the formation of ATP driven by transport of protons across a mitochondrial membrane to generate an electrochemical gradient (proton-motive force)." [GOC:vw]

name: Complex I biogenesis
description: Complex I biogenesis

name: proton motive force-driven ATP synthesis
description: "The chemical reactions and pathways resulting in the formation of ATP driven by transport of protons across a membrane to generate an electrochemical gradient (proton-motive force)." [GOC:vw]

name: respiratory chain complex
description: "Any protein complex that is part of a respiratory chain." [GOC:dos]

name: aerobic electron transport chain
description: "A process in which a series of electron carriers operate together to transfer electrons from donors such as NADH and FADH2 to oxygen to generate a transmembrane electrochemical gradient." [GOC:ai, GOC:mtg_electron_transport]

name: Oxidative phosphorylation
description: Oxidative phosphorylation

name: ATP synthesis coupled electron transport
description: "The transfer of electrons through a series of electron donors and acceptors, generating energy that is ultimately used for synthesis of ATP." [ISBN:0716731363]

name: mitochondrial ATP synthesis coupled electron transport
description: "The transfer of electrons through a series of electron donors and acceptors, generating energy that is ultimately used for synthesis of ATP, as it occurs in the mitochondrial inner membrane or chloroplast thylakoid membrane." [GOC:mtg_sensu, ISBN:0716731363]

name: Abnormal oral glucose tolerance
description: An abnormal resistance to glucose, i.e., a reduction in the ability to maintain glucose levels in the blood stream within normal limits following oral administration of glucose.

name: electron transport chain
description: "A process in which a series of electron carriers operate together to transfer electrons from donors to any of several different terminal electron acceptors." [GOC:mtg_electron_transport]

name: Oxidative phosphorylation
description: Oxidative phosphorylation

name: oxidative phosphorylation
description: "The phosphorylation of ADP to ATP that accompanies the oxidation of a metabolite through the operation of the respiratory chain. Oxidation of compounds establishes a proton gradient across the membrane, providing the energy for ATP synthesis." [ISBN:0198506732, ISBN:0471331309]

name: carbohydrate derivative metabolic process
description: "The chemical reactions and pathways involving carbohydrate derivative." [GOC:TermGenie]

name: carbohydrate derivative biosynthetic process
description: "The chemical reactions and pathways resulting in the formation of carbohydrate derivative." [GOC:TermGenie]

name: carbohydrate metabolic process
description: "The chemical reactions and pathways involving carbohydrates, any of a group of organic compounds based of the general formula Cx(H2O)y." [GOC:mah, ISBN:0198506732]

name: Type II diabetes mellitus
description: Type II diabetes mellitus

name: Carbohydrate digestion and absorption
description: Carbohydrate digestion and absorption

name: Hyperinsulinemic hypoglycemia
description: An increased concentration of insulin combined with a decreased concentration of glucose in the blood.
